note: Shared source of truth for retrain hyperparameters. Selected via `python -m src.models.train --model logreg --tune`. Both the manual command in README's Quick Start (--params-file config/registered_model_params.json) and the scheduled retrain workflow (scripts/refresh_and_freeze.py) read this file. Update it — and re-run --tune first — whenever a real re-tune picks a new model/config; do not hand-edit the params without re-tuning, and do not let this go stale silently.
